description: Directed hyperedges from chokepoint sources to many downstream targets. Captures the fan-out from critical-path items.

edges.fan_out_semantics: Webhook event-dispatch substrate. orgEvents table populated by T9-3 is shared by real-time subscriptions (T9-7), reader-side office notifier (T8-8), and dev portal documentation (T9-8). Coalition aggregation can read external webhook events as an integration.
edges.wave_lift: W-2 work unblocks W-3 and W-4 dependents

edges.fan_out_semantics: Mainnet contracts are the substrate for production receipt anchoring, production on-chain stake verification, on-chain engagement tree updates, browser verification against mainnet root, IPFS-pinned artifact Merkle proofs, long-term-survivable claims. Wave 3 lift.
edges.elapsed_time_dependency: 1-2 weeks engineering + 2-4 weeks elapsed (security audit, Safe multisig setup)

edges.fan_out_semantics: TEE deployment unblocks AI panel attestation (T5-4), completes Cluster 1 verification substrate (LocalConstituentResolver replaced by attested NitroEnclaveResolver), and position privacy ZK + reveal attestation can chain to enclave key.
edges.elapsed_time_dependency: 2-3 weeks elapsed (AWS Nitro account, EC2 provisioning, enclave build, PCR0 measurement, vsock proxy)

edges.fan_out_semantics: Delegation executor unblocks all Cluster 4 surface items: per-supporter alerts (T4-3), agentic monitoring (T4-4), cross-org portability (T4-5), pricing enforcement (T4-6), trace observability (T4-8), delegation UI (T4-9), multi-agent flows (T4-10). Without executor, FEATURES.DELEGATION stays false and capability transcendence agentic claims remain aspirational.
edges.elapsed_time_dependency: 3-4 weeks for executor + 1.5-2 weeks for proof attachment infra (T4-2)

edges.fan_out_semantics: State legislator officeholder data (OpenStates ingestion) is the foundation for multi-jurisdiction routing (T3-8), per-district feeds (T3-10), agentic monitoring across boundary types (T4-4), and state-bill scorecards (T6-6). Foundational to half of Wave 3-4 reach work.

Coalition aggregation API (replacing HTTP 501) establishes cross-org query pattern that shared supporter pools (T7-2), reputation portability (T7-3), coalition packet computation (T7-5), network rate limits (T7-9), and per-DM cross-org profile (T8-7) all build on.
DM office profile + email verification is the auth foundation for all reader-side personalization: dashboard UI (T8-1b), CRM integration feed (T8-5), webhook notifier (T8-8), weekly digest (T8-9).
Receipt Merkle anchoring pipeline unlocks anchoring cadence (T6-3), browser verification UI (T6-7), long-term archive (T6-10), IPFS-pinned artifact (T8-4b), and long-term-survivable pattern (T8-6).
draftedMessages table + proof attachment pattern is required by executor (T4-1), message writer proof binding (T4-7), and delegation UI for showing pending approvals (T4-9).
reputationTier writer is the foundation for engagementTier cross-check (T10-2), CAI honesty (T10-4), engagement tier histogram showing real data (T10-10), and debate-to-tier promotion (T5-6).
